mapper.sql: id, participant_a_id, participant_b_id, last_message, last_message_at, a_deleted_at, b_deleted_at, a_pinned, a_pinned_at, a_muted, b_pinned, b_pinned_at, b_muted, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_conversation WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM blog_conversation WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND ( (participant_a_id = #{userId} AND a_deleted_at IS NULL) OR (participant_b_id = #{userId} AND b_deleted_at IS NULL) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN participant_a_id = #{userId} THEN a_pinned ELSE b_pinned END DESC, CASE WHEN participant_a_id = #{userId} THEN a_pinned_at ELSE b_pinned_at END DESC, last_message_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_conversation WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND ( (participant_a_id = #{userId} AND a_deleted_at IS NULL) OR (participant_b_id = #{userId} AND b_deleted_at IS NULL) )

SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN participant_a_id = #{userId} THEN participant_b_id ELSE participant_a_id END AS peer_user_id FROM blog_conversation WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND ( (participant_a_id = #{userId} AND a_deleted_at IS NULL) OR (participant_b_id = #{userId} AND b_deleted_at IS NULL) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_conversation (id, participant_a_id, participant_b_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{participantAId}, #{participantBId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_conversation SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_message_at = #{lastMessageAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE blog_conversation
a_deleted_at = NOW(), b_deleted_at = NOW(),
updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE blog_conversation
a_pinned = #{pinned}, a_pinned_at = CASE WHEN #{pinned} = TRUE THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
b_pinned = #{pinned}, b_pinned_at = CASE WHEN #{pinned} = TRUE THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE blog_conversation
a_muted = #{muted}, b_muted = #{muted},
updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
